instructions.name: cctp_deposit_for_burn
docs: Burns tokens through Circle CCTP without creating a managed inflight position.

instructions.name: commit_oft_transfer
docs: Verifies the OFT send completed and records the resulting transfer.

instructions.name: managed_cctp_deposit_for_burn
docs: Burns tokens through Circle CCTP and records a managed inflight bridge position.

instructions.name: prepare_oft_transfer
docs: Prepares the auxiliary token account used by the OFT transfer flow.

instructions.name: price_managed_transfers
docs: Prices managed inflight transfers and publishes aggregated amount.

instructions.name: settle_managed_transfer
docs: Settles a managed inflight transfer and removes it from the registry.

instructions.name: validate_managed_transfer
docs: Validates a managed inflight transfer so that it becomes priceable.

errors.name: UnsupportedProtocol
errors.msg: Unsupported bridge protocol

errors.name: PolicyNotFound
errors.msg: A matching bridge policy was not found

errors.name: AmountTooSmall
errors.msg: Bridge amount is below the policy minimum

errors.name: AmountTooLarge
errors.msg: Bridge amount exceeds the policy maximum

errors.name: InvalidProviderProgram
errors.msg: The provider program does not match the approved policy

errors.name: InvalidSourceTokenAccount
errors.msg: The source token account is invalid

errors.name: InvalidSourceBalance
errors.msg: The source token balance did not change as expected

errors.name: InvalidProviderReceipt
errors.msg: The bridge receipt metadata is invalid

errors.name: InvalidTransferStatus
errors.msg: The bridge transfer status does not allow this action

errors.name: TransferNotManaged
errors.msg: Only managed transfers can use this instruction

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidTransferRecord
errors.msg: The transfer record does not belong to this vault

errors.name: TooManyProviderInstructions
errors.msg: Too many provider instructions were supplied

errors.name: DuplicateBridgeRoute
errors.msg: Bridge policy contains overlapping duplicate routes

errors.name: BridgeRouteNotFound
errors.msg: The bridge route was not found in the existing policy

errors.name: AmbiguousBridgeRoute
errors.msg: Multiple bridge routes matched; disambiguate the provider identity

errors.name: InvalidOftAuxiliaryTokenAccount
errors.msg: The OFT auxiliary token account is invalid

errors.name: OftAuxiliaryTokenAccountAlreadyExists
errors.msg: The OFT auxiliary token account already exists

errors.name: MissingEndOftInstruction
errors.msg: Transaction must include a matching commit_oft_transfer instruction

errors.name: InvalidOftInstructionSet
errors.msg: The OFT middle instruction set is invalid

errors.name: InvalidOftAuxiliaryBalance
errors.msg: The OFT auxiliary token balance did not change as expected

errors.name: InvalidRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: The remaining accounts are invalid

errors.name: DuplicateTransferRecord
errors.msg: Duplicate transfer record found

errors.name: TooManyManagedTransfers
errors.msg: Too many managed transfers are inflight for this vault

errors.name: InvalidBridgeRegistry
errors.msg: The bridge registry does not belong to this vault

errors.name: InvalidDestinationChain
errors.msg: The destination identifier exceeds the supported range

types.name: IntegrationAcl
docs: An integration program can have multiple protocols supported.
Enabled protocols are stored in a bitmask, and each protocol can have its own policy.

types.name: IntegrationPermissions
docs: Stores delegate permissions for an integration program.

types.name: LayerzeroOftRoute
docs: source_mint, destination_chain, destination_recipient, provider_program uniquely identify a route

types.name: OracleConfigs
docs: Vault-specific oracle configs. If available, these configs are preferred over the global config.

types.name: ProtocolPermissions
docs: Represents a delegate's permissions for a specific protocol

types.name: ProtocolPolicy
docs: Stores policy data for an integrated protocol.
